titleStmt.title: SII 11.200: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 200. (B.K. No. 123 of 1926-27.) KURTAKŌṬI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF VIRŪPĀKSHA.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the Chāḷukya-Vikrama Kāla and is dated Śaka 1048, Parābhava, Jyēshṭha, amāvāsye, Monday, solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1126, June 22, Tuesday, ·44. The date of the record falls in the Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 51. The amāvāsyā commenced at ·47 on Monday. The Śaka year cited was current and the month was Nija-Jyēshṭha. It registers a gift of certain taxes by Kēśarāja, the Sandhivigrahin of the Daṇḍanāyaka Sellapayya, for the worship of the god Dāsēśvara of Kuṟutakūṇṭe. The Dōṇi One-Thousand (guild) received the gift which was to be protected by them and the Two-Hundred Mahājanas headed by the Ūroḍeya Svāmikumāra-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikrama kāla
da sakavarṣa 1048 neya parābhavasaṁ
vatsarada jyēṣṭhadamavāsye sōmavāra
sūryyagrahaṇada tatkāḷika
doḷu śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ ku
ṟutakūṇṭeya śrīmat dāsēsvara dēva
ra Aṁgabhōgakke . svasti samastaprasa stisa
hita jaragina teṟeya sarvvādhikāri śrī madde
ṇḍanāyaka sellapayyaṁgaḷa sandhi vigrahi sama
staguṇagaṇāḷankritanappa kēśarājaṁ tamma jaragi
na teṟeyoḷa gondu dōṇiya teṟe yumaṁ
sēsayuma navāntaradeṟeyumaṁ sarvvabā
dhāparihāramāge dēvargge biṭṭaru guṁjiga dā
siyaṇna balliseṭṭi vaijaya bammaṇna ha
ḍavaḷa mācaṇna Aṇuva nāgasōva yya
nāyaka baḷagāṟa dēvaṇna Ūṁdu ga mā
baṇna nintiva rmmukhyavāgi dōṇi sāsirvva
ru dēvargge paḍaderī dharmma(ṁ) manūroḍeya
svāmikumāra bhaṭṭōpādhyāya pramu
kha mahājana vinnūrvvaruṁ bandarasu
gaḷuṁ dōṇisāsirvvaru tamma dharmmamā
ge kiḍalīyade pratipāḷisuvaru .
Ī dharmmamaṁ kiḍalīyade kādāta vāra
ṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge A
rgghyatīrtthagaḷeṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁga ḷoḷu sā
sira kavileya kōḍuṁkoḷagumaṁ paṁ
cara�da kaṭṭisi sūryyagrahaṇade
tātkāḷikadoḷu caturvvēda pāragarappa
ritvijarkaḷu gubhayamukhigaḷaṁ koṭṭa pha
ḷa makku Idanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsiyo
ḷu sāsira kavileyumaṁ caturvvēda sāraga
rappa brāhmaṇaruma naḷida mahā pātaka
nakku . dēśado ḷagriyaneniside dāsēśvara dē
gulake baṁdanunayadiṁ kēsavarājaṁ dōṇi
ya sāsanamaṁ barasi dharmmamaṁ prakaṭisidaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
